title: Bank Manager Referral Guide
seoTitle: Bank Manager Referral Guide | DMV BizFund OS
metaDescription: A referral guide for bank managers who need a clean next step for business clients who may not fit traditional bank requirements right now.
summary: Help declined or not-yet-bank-ready clients find a practical next step without damaging the relationship.
body: Bank managers often meet solid operators who simply do not fit the bank's box right now. A decline does not have to become a dead end or an awkward hallway ghosting ritual.
clientPainIndicators: Revenue exists but bank criteria are not met
Client needs capital faster than traditional underwriting allows
whenToRefer: When the client needs readiness guidance
When speed matters but guarantees would be inappropriate
When the client needs a non-bank next step
howReferralWorks: Send the client to the readiness scorecard or application path, or use the partner intake route. The goal is a professional next step, not a reckless promise.
starterKitCTA: Get the Referral Partner Starter Kit

title: Accountant Referral Guide
seoTitle: Accountant Referral Guide | DMV BizFund OS
metaDescription: A referral guide for accountants who want to help clients prepare for business funding conversations.
summary: Help clients spot funding readiness gaps before cash flow becomes a five-alarm spreadsheet fire.
body: Accountants see the smoke before the owner admits there is a fire. This guide helps accountants direct clients toward readiness tools and funding next steps.
whenToRefer: When funding need is obvious but the path is not
howReferralWorks: Point the client toward the scorecard, application path, or partner referral route. Strong preparation can improve the quality of the conversation even though approval is never guaranteed.
starterKitCTA: Get the Referral Partner Starter Kit
